# DocZ+ - Secure Digital Legal Locker on Polygon Blockchain

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Blockchain-Polygon-7B3FE4?style=for-the-badge" alt="Polygon">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Frontend-React-61DAFB?style=for-the-badge" alt="React">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Backend-Serverless-FF6B6B?style=for-the-badge" alt="Vercel">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Database-MongoDB-47A248?style=for-the-badge" alt="MongoDB">
</p>

> **DocZ+** is a decentralized document verification and storage platform built on the Polygon blockchain. It provides a secure, tamper-proof, and instantly verifiable system for managing legal documents.

## Live Status

| Component | Status | Address |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Smart Contract | Deployed | `0x44b8a61D90b2Ef97A411a05277537DF520E0055F` |
| Network | Polygon Amoy Testnet | Chain ID: 80002 |
| Explorer | [View on OKLink](https://www.oklink.com/amoy/address/0x44b8a61D90b2Ef97A411a05277537DF520E0055F) |

## Features

- **Blockchain-Powered Security** - Documents are hashed and stored permanently on Polygon
- **IPFS Storage** - Distributed file storage with content addressing
- **MetaMask Integration** - Seamless wallet-based authentication
- **Multi-Language Support** - English, Hindi, Kannada (SDG-16 compliant)
- **Access Control** - Granular permissions with wallet addresses
- **QR Code Sharing** - Generate shareable verification links
- **Audit Trail** - Complete history of all document actions
- **Responsive Design** - Works on desktop and mobile

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- MetaMask browser extension
- Vercel account (for deployment)

### 1. Smart Contract (Already Deployed)

```
Network: Polygon Amoy Testnet
Contract: 0x44b8a61D90b2Ef97A411a05277537DF520E0055F
```

### 2. Local development — use **`api/`** (not `server/`)

The **website** is **`client/`**. The backend you run by default is **`api/`** (`local-server.js`, port **5000**). Vite sends `/api` → `localhost:5000`.

**Why two backends?** **`server/`** is an **alternate** stack (Express + Socket.io). **`api/`** matches this README and **Vercel**. Do **not** run both on 5000.

Put **`.env` in the repo root** (`poli/`). Minimum: **`MONGODB_URI`**, **`JWT_SECRET`**. Optional: contract, wallet, Pinata (otherwise chain/IPFS often simulate).

**Option A — from repo root (recommended)**

```bash
cd poli
npm install
npm run setup
npm run dev
```

Open **http://localhost:5173**

**Option B — two terminals**

```bash
# Terminal 1 — API
cd api
npm install
npm start

# Terminal 2 — frontend
cd client
npm install
npm run dev
```

Open **http://localhost:5173**

### 3. Deploy to Vercel

```bash
# Install Vercel CLI
npm i -g vercel

# Login
vercel login

# Deploy
vercel --prod
```

### 4. Deploy on Render (API + static frontend)

You need **two** Render resources: a **Web Service** (Node API) and a **Static Site** (Vite build), or use the repo **`render.yaml`** as a Blueprint.

**A. API (Web Service)**

| Setting | Value |
|--------|--------|
| Root directory | `api` |
| Runtime | Node |
| Build command | `npm install` |
| Start command | `npm start` |
| Health check path | `/api/health` |

Add **environment variables** in the Render dashboard (same names as local `.env`):

- `MONGODB_URI`, `JWT_SECRET`
- `CONTRACT_ADDRESS`, `PRIVATE_KEY`, `POLYGON_AMOY_URL` (if you use real chain txs)
- `IPFS_API_KEY`, `IPFS_API_SECRET`, `IPFS_GATEWAY_URL` (optional; else uploads simulate)
- `CLIENT_URL` — **public URL of your frontend**, e.g. `https://docz-web-xxxx.onrender.com` (for CORS / links)
- Do **not** set `PORT` yourself — Render injects it

The API listens on `0.0.0.0` and uses `process.env.PORT` (already wired in `local-server.js`).

**B. Frontend (Static Site)**

| Setting | Value |
|--------|--------|
| Root directory | `client` |
| Build command | `npm install && npm run build` |
| Publish directory | `dist` |

**Critical:** add **`VITE_API_URL`** with the **public API base including `/api`**, for example:

`https://docz-api-xxxx.onrender.com/api`

Vite only reads env vars **at build time**, so set `VITE_API_URL` before the first (or next) static deploy. After the API gets its final URL, redeploy the static site if you change it.

**C. Order**

1. Deploy the **API** first; copy its URL (e.g. `https://docz-api.onrender.com`).
2. Create **`VITE_API_URL`** = that URL + **`/api`** on the **static** service, then build/deploy the frontend.
3. Set **`CLIENT_URL`** on the **API** to your static site URL and redeploy the API if CORS issues appear.

## Environment Variables

### Render (Web Service — `api`)

Use the same variables as in root `.env`, except `PORT` (Render provides it). Never commit real secrets; paste them only in the Render dashboard.

### Vercel Dashboard

Add these in Settings > Environment Variables:

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `MONGODB_URI` | MongoDB connection string (Atlas or local) |
| `JWT_SECRET` | Long random string for signing tokens |
| `CONTRACT_ADDRESS` | Deployed DocumentVault address (Polygon Amoy) |
| `PRIVATE_KEY` | Server wallet key for chain txs (keep secret) |
| `POLYGON_AMOY_URL` | e.g. `https://rpc-amoy.polygon.technology` |
| `IPFS_API_KEY` / `IPFS_API_SECRET` | Pinata (optional; uploads simulate if omitted) |
| `IPFS_GATEWAY_URL` | e.g. `https://gateway.pinata.cloud/ipfs/` |

Do not commit real secrets; use `.env` locally and Vercel env in production.

## API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/health` | Health check |
| POST | `/api/users/auth` | Authenticate with wallet |
| GET | `/api/users/profile` | Get user profile |
| PUT | `/api/users/profile` | Update profile |
| GET | `/api/documents/types` | Get document types |
| GET | `/api/documents/stats` | Get user stats |
| GET | `/api/documents` | List documents |
| POST | `/api/documents/upload` | Upload document |
| POST | `/api/documents/verify` | Verify document |
| POST | `/api/documents/:id/share` | Share document |
| GET | `/api/documents/shared/:linkId` | Access shared document |
| POST | `/api/documents/:id/access` | Manage access |
| POST | `/api/documents/:id/revoke` | Revoke document |
| DELETE | `/api/documents/:id` | Delete document |

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Blockchain | Polygon Amoy (EVM) |
| Smart Contract | Solidity 0.8.20 |
| Backend | Vercel Serverless |
| Database | MongoDB Atlas |
| File Storage | IPFS (Pinata) |
| Frontend | React + Vite |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Authentication | MetaMask + JWT |

## User Roles

- **Citizen** - Upload, store, share documents
- **Lawyer** - Verify documents, access shared files
- **Authority** - Approve documents, add official records
- **Admin** - Full system access

## Security Features

- SHA-256 file hashing before upload
- Content-addressed storage on IPFS
- Blockchain hash verification
- Wallet-based identity
- JWT authentication
- Rate limiting
- Input validation
